name: Stir Fried Chicken and Broccoli
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds boneless skinless chicken breasts/cut into thin strips
4 cups Chinese cabbage or Bok Choy, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wok or large heavy skillet, heat oil over high heat.
2. Gradually add chicken to the very hot oil with half of the minced gingerroot. Stir-fry for 2 minutes. Remove from the wok and set aside.
3. Add onion and stir-fry for 2 minutes. Set aside with the chicken.
4. Add broccoli, carrots, mushrooms, and the remaining gingerroot to the wok. Stir-fry for 2 minutes.
5. If necessary, add a little water to prevent sticking. Mix chicken stock, sherry, and soy sauce. Pour over the vegetables.
6. Cover and steam for 2 minutes.
7. Stir in onions and chicken. Mix cornstarch and water. Stir into the wok.
8. Bring to a boil. Add Chinese cabbage or Bok Choy. Stir and cook for 1 minute until crisp-tender.
